## Purpose

Describe the problem and why this repository owns the change.

## Contract And Boundary Impact

State any public API, contract, security, persistence, generated-source, or cross-repository impact. Write `None` when none applies.

## Validation

List the exact checks run and any skipped environment-specific checks.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change serves the repository purpose and intended whole.
- [ ] Tests cover behavioral changes.
- [ ] Documentation and authority fixtures are current.
- [ ] Generated files were reproduced by their owner.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private data, or legacy artifacts are included.
- [ ] Every commit includes a DCO sign-off.
